title: Codex отправил пост в Telegram
claim_supported: GCONF publicly reported that Codex opened Telegram on a Mac, found a dialog, sent the post, and attached a screenshot.
limitation: First-party demonstration; no architecture, permission model, or failure behavior is shown.

title: OpenClaw / Hermes: как я собираю AI-операционку
locator: telegram:1633415027:1029; sections 1-3 and list under 'что сейчас уже происходит'
claim_supported: A first-person GCONF report describes Telegram access, voice input, selected context, acknowledged risk, and explicit permission before writing to some chats.
limitation: Personal self-report; implementation, cost, reliability, and the full access boundary are not published.

title: Agent-first архитектура внутренних процессов GCONF
claim_supported: GCONF publicly describes Telegram as an increasing center for communication and project management and says processes are being designed for agent context and interaction.
limitation: Team self-report with broad language; no current end-to-end workflow artifact, error log, cost, or full permission model.

title: Опыты участников трёхнедельного потока
locator: telegram:1633415027:1001; participant blockquotes before the 3-week cohort CTA
claim_supported: The organizer roundup describes multi-step artifacts including POS reporting, a shared context base, a coaching bot, and an application review loop.
limitation: Promotion-selected organizer roundup; quoted results are participant reports, not independently verified outcomes.

title: Короткий roundup результатов прошлого потока
locator: telegram:1633415027:1028; sequence of short participant quotations
claim_supported: A second organizer roundup records a variety of first artifacts and self-described behavior shifts from the prior cohort.
limitation: Short anonymous quotations selected for promotion; context, follow-up, and independent verification are absent.

title: Результаты первого AI weekend
locator: telegram:1633415027:1046; four participant blockquotes after the two-day format description
claim_supported: The organizer reports a barrier-crossing observation plus a ticket-slot monitor, Telegram calendar, and game prototype from the two-day weekend.
limitation: Organizer-reported, promotion-selected cases with no standardized follow-up or comparable baseline.

title: Агент два дня ловил билетные слоты для восьми человек
claim_supported: The approved card preserves participant origin, described-result proof level, working artifact status, behavior shift, and organizer-report limitation.
limitation: Derivative semantic card; the underlying evidence remains an anonymous organizer quotation and the implementation is not shown.

title: Календарь с управлением через Telegram и дайджестами
claim_supported: The approved card records the described Telegram-calendar workflow, behavior shift, participant origin, and anonymous-report limitation.
limitation: Derivative semantic card based on one anonymous organizer quotation; no follow-up behavior is documented.
